# rsync --exclude-from (paths relative to transfer root)
# IDE mirrors are regenerated by ./setup.sh; local symlinks break Windows robocopy.
.claude/
.cursor/
# Team-specific story drafts — use examples/ for public samples only.
stories/
# Heavily product-specific sample epic (optional; omit from public mirror).
examples/onboard-epic/
# Machine-local SDLC state (paths, sqlite); recreated by setup in each clone.
.sdlc/
.env
env/.env
env/.env.local
env/.env.production
env/.env.staging
.mcp.json
env/.last-ado-create.json
